action.reasoning: Observation: Embedded DKT h=1024/e=96/d=0.5 reached val peak 0.7593 (higher than prior 0.7582) but test AUC regressed to 0.7541 vs best 0.7548; ran all 30 epochs with overfitting after ep~25 (val decline, train loss to 0.522). Analysis: Higher capacity helps val but needs tuned reg (dropout/wd/LR) + reliable ES to stop at peak; current train.py likely has incomplete/truncated save logic at best_auc. Decision: Rewrite complete clean train.py with h=768/l=2/e=128/d=0.4/lr=4e-4/wd=5e-5/epochs=40/ES-patience=12/scheduler-patience=5; this balances capacity+reg, should hit higher val peak and better test generalization (~70s iter). Submit eval immediately after.
